response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with nearly two decades of hands-on experience, genuine open-source credentials (GISCollective founder, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker), and solid Linux background — all of which fit the company's open-source and digital-sovereignty focus. However, this is an executive leadership role in German IT consulting, and his profile shows critical gaps: his German is self-rated as Basic against a hard C1 minimum, he has no demonstrated formal team-leadership or technical project-management track record, and there is no evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/compliance advisory work. The language gap alone is disqualifying for a client-facing leadership position advising German clients.
strengths: Extensive, diverse engineering experience (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput backend) with strong software craftsmanship practices
Authentic open-source and Linux commitment: founded GISCollective, maintains D-language libraries, conference speaker
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing ability through workshops, courses, and community teaching
concerns: German at Basic level versus the required C1 minimum for a client-facing German consulting role
No formal people-leadership or technical project-management experience; career is almost entirely senior IC roles
No evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/risk/compliance advisory experience; Python absent from skills

key_factors.factor: Deep open-source and Linux engineering background
Lack of leadership and architecture-governance track record
